artifact.content_preview:
From: marie.lefebvre@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: project-team-ngis@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: NGIS Phase 3 — Weekly Status / Mise à jour hebdomadaire
Date: Wed, 4 Mar 2026 10:05:00 -0500

Hello team / Bonjour l'équipe,

ENGLISH SECTION:

This week's status update for NGIS Phase 3 is as follows:

Work completed:
- Active Directory migration for Site A (Gatineau) is 80% complete.
- Network topology diagrams updated to reflect revised switch placement.

Action Items (English):
1. Please schedule a follow-up tech

extracted_tasks.text: schedule a follow-up technical review meeting before March 11 to finalize the AD migration cutover plan. Coordinate with Dave Chen
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Please schedule a follow-up technical review meeting before March 11 to finalize the AD migration cutover plan. Coordinate with Dave Chen.

extracted_tasks.text: review the updated security compliance checklist (attached) and confirm sign-off by March 9, 2026
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: All team members must review the updated security compliance checklist (attached) and confirm sign-off by March 9, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: mettre à jour le registre des risques du projet d'ici le 10 mars 2026 pour inclure le risque de délai du fournisseur
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Veuillez mettre à jour le registre des risques du projet d'ici le 10 mars 2026 pour inclure le risque de délai du fournisseur.

extracted_tasks.text: Confirmez les livrables révisés avec le fournisseur principal (TechSupplier) d'ici le 12 mars 2026
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Confirmez les livrables révisés avec le fournisseur principal (TechSupplier) d'ici le 12 mars 2026.
